name: Montrose (Uncompaghre)

restrictions.text: Fire restrictions in place, for up to date info:

thresholds:
ERC > 90%, BI > 90%, Wind Speed > 15
Max Temp > 85, Min Rh < 20, 1000-hr Fuels <13, Max RH < 55
If three or more of the seven thresholds are met, consider it a watchout.
raws:
The Uncompahgre Fire Danger Rating Area uses the following Remote Automated Weather Stations (RAWS) which are equally weighted in value, using Fuel Model Y (Timber) incorporating data years 2005-2024 are:  
Carpenter Ridge (53808), Doniguez (Jacks Canyon) (52409), Sanborn Park (53804)
